query:
-- 3. Lusha enrichment log — all time
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as calls, SUM(creditsUsed) as credits,
       MIN(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as firstUse,
       MAX(DATE(FROM_UNIXTIME(createdAt/1000))) as lastUse
FROM lushaEnrichmentLog
GROUP BY status;
